DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALISON YEW OF LEWIS BRISBOIS & SMITH LLP, TEL. NO. 438-6644 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SEGWAY INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION OF THE COMPLAINT IS Sustained with ten days to amend. Plaintiff has not sufficiently alleged that Segway made any representations that she relied on. Plaintiff has leave to amend, if she can do so in good faith, to allege each misrepresentation made by Segway, who made the misrepresentation, when it was made, and how it was communicated. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HK
